title: Hip-Hop-Forschung: Ansätze, Kontroversen, Perspektiven
further_info: Recommended Reading F. Murray u. M. Neal (Hg.), That’s the Joint!: The Hip-Hop Studies Reader, New York 22012; T. Rose, Black Noise: Rap Music and Black Culture in Contemporary America, Middletown 1994; T. Rose, The Hip Hop Wars: What We Talk About When We Talk About Hip Hop–And Why It Matters, New York 2008; Q. Williams u. J. Singh (Hg.), Global Hiphopography, Cham 2023.
